allow: PowerShell(npm install 2>&1 | Tee-Object -Variable npmOutput; Write-Output "===EXIT CODE: $LASTEXITCODE===")

Bash(node -e "const pl=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const want=['@linenext/dapp-portal-sdk','@reown/appkit','@reown/appkit-wallet-button','@reown/appkit-controllers','@reown/appkit-scaffold-ui','@walletconnect/universal-provider']; for\(const k of want\){const v=pl.packages['node_modules/'+k]; console.log\(k.padEnd\(45\), v?v.version:'\(not found\)'\)}")
PowerShell(npm.cmd run build 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Output "===EXIT CODE: $LASTEXITCODE===")

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path node_modules\) { "node_modules EXISTS" } else { "node_modules MISSING" }; if \(Test-Path dist\) { "dist EXISTS" } else { "dist MISSING" }; "Node: $\(node -v\)"; "npm: $\(npm -v\)")
PowerShell($sw = [Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); npm run build 2>&1 | Out-String; $sw.Stop\(\); "---EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE, ELAPSED: $\($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds\)s---")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem dist | Select-Object Mode,Length,Name | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "---"; "index.html exists: $\(Test-Path dist\\index.html\)"; "assets/ exists: $\(Test-Path dist\\assets\)"; "assets file count: $\(\(Get-ChildItem dist\\assets -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count\)"; "dist total size: $\([math]::Round\(\(Get-ChildItem dist -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB, 2\)\) MB")

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path dist\\index.html\) { "dist/index.html EXISTS, modified: $\(\(Get-Item dist\\index.html\).LastWriteTime\)" } else { "dist/index.html MISSING - need rebuild" }; "---"; if \(Test-Path .github\\workflows\) { Get-ChildItem .github\\workflows -File | Select-Object Name,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String } else { "No .github/workflows directory" })

PowerShell($result = ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o PreferredAuthentications=publickey -i $HOME\\.ssh\\id_rsa digiray@218.234.18.116 "echo KEY_AUTH_OK; whoami; hostname" 2>&1 | Out-String; "$result"; "---EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE---")

PowerShell(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o PreferredAuthentications=publickey -i $HOME\\.ssh\\id_rsa digiray@218.234.18.116 "echo KEY_AUTH_OK; whoami; hostname; uname -a; pwd" 2>&1 | Out-String; "---EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE---")

PowerShell(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -i $HOME\\.ssh\\id_rsa digiray@218.234.18.116 "PID=`$\(cat /tmp/luckyserve.pid\); echo PID=`$PID; ps -p `$PID -o pid,etime,cmd --no-headers; echo; echo '== port =='; ss -ltn | grep 8080; echo; echo '== root =='; curl -sS -m 5 -o /dev/null -w 'root:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:8080/; echo '== fallback =='; curl -sS -m 5 -o /dev/null -w 'spa:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:8080/dice; echo '== asset =='; curl -sS -m 5 -o /dev/null -w 'asset:%{http_code} size:%{size_download}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:8080/favicon.ico" 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell("=== gh CLI installed? ==="; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { gh --version 2>&1 | Out-String; "auth status:"; gh auth status 2>&1 | Out-String })
